app.title: Graham++
app.subtitle: Stocks read through a Graham–Buffett lens
app.noTheses: No saved analyses yet. Analyze a stock to get started.

alerts.price: Price moved more than 15% since analysis
alerts.tier: Key indicator changed tier since analysis

empty.title: No saved analyses
empty.subtitle: Search a stock to get started

sectionDesc.A: Is the business growing — and how fast?
sectionDesc.B: Does the growth turn into real profit?
sectionDesc.C: How well can the business absorb stress?
sectionDesc.D: Is the price fair for what you get?
sectionDesc.E: Will the profitability persist over time?
sectionDesc.F: Where is management taking the business — forward or back?

indicatorDesc.A3_fcfConversion: How much of the profit converts to real cash
indicatorDesc.A4_ownerEarnings: Cash the owner can extract without harming the business
indicatorDesc.B1_grossMargin: How much remains from each revenue dollar after production costs
indicatorDesc.B2_operatingMargin: Operating efficiency — profit after all running costs
indicatorDesc.B3_netMargin: Final profit from each revenue dollar
indicatorDesc.B4_roic: How much each invested dollar earns inside the business
indicatorDesc.B5_roe: How much each dollar of equity earns
indicatorDesc.C3_interestCoverage: How many times profit covers interest payments
indicatorDesc.C4_netDebtEbitda: Years of operating profit needed to repay debt
indicatorDesc.D1_pe: Price the market pays for each dollar of profit
indicatorDesc.D2_forwardPE: P/E based on next year's expected earnings
indicatorDesc.D3_peg: P/E relative to the growth rate
indicatorDesc.D4_fcfYield: Cash the business generates relative to its market value
indicatorDesc.D5_evEbitda: Total enterprise value relative to operating profit
indicatorDesc.D7_marginOfSafety: Gap between current price and estimated intrinsic value
indicatorDesc.D8_dividendYield: Annual dividend as a percent of the current price
indicatorDesc.D9_payoutRatio: Share of earnings paid out as dividends — sustainability check
indicatorDesc.D10_dividendStreak: Years of consecutive non-decreasing annual dividends — durability signal
indicatorDesc.E2_roicMoat: ROIC as confirmation of a competitive advantage
indicatorDesc.F1_roicTrend: Direction of change in return on invested capital
indicatorDesc.F2_fcfConversionTrend: Direction of change in profit-to-cash quality
indicatorDesc.F3_insiderSignal: Net insider buying over the last 6 months as a percent of market cap

reality.killSwitchesHeader: Conditions that would invalidate the thesis

context.catalystNone: No clear trigger identified in the visible horizon
context.nextEarningsSub: Recommended checkpoint to revisit the analysis

moatSub.above: ROIC {{value}}% — above the 15% threshold confirming a moat
moatSub.between: ROIC {{value}}% — below the 15% threshold for a wide moat

moatTypeText.NetworkEffects: Network effect — each user adds value

problemDefault.Temporary: A temporary situation affecting current performance
problemDefault.Structural: A structural shift in the business
problemDefault.Mixed: A mix of temporary and structural factors
problemDefault.None: No notable issue in the data

problemSub.Temporary: Not a structural shift — same business, same market
problemSub.Structural: Structural shift — requires reassessing the business
problemSub.Mixed: Combination of temporary and structural factors

errors.tickerNotFound: Ticker not found. Please check and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

discovery.noSituations: Graham didn't find interesting situations in the last scan
discovery.scanPending: Nightly scan hasn't run yet. You can search a ticker manually in the meantime.
discovery.fromCacheJustNow: Analysis from nightly scan · updated just now
discovery.fromCacheMinutes: Analysis from nightly scan · updated {{minutes}} min ago
discovery.fromCacheHours: Analysis from nightly scan · updated {{hours}} hr ago

title.narrative_collapse: Fear priced faster than fundamentals deteriorate
title.silent_compounder: A silent compounder the market has forgotten
title.consensus_fear: Consensus fear — is the market right this time?
title.forgotten_quality: Ignored quality during the AI narrative mania
title.anti_hype_value: Cheap because boring, or boring because broken?
title.expectation_mismatch: Priced for a future that may not arrive
title.overpriced_perfection: Priced for perfection — what if it's not?
title.unclassified_buy: Worth a closer look — but with conditions
title.unclassified_wait: Mixed signals — the case isn't clear yet
title.unclassified_avoid: Risk dominates the picture right now
title.unclassified: What is the market currently mispricing here?

actionLine.cyclical_panic: Watch for cycle-trough confirmation in the next earnings cycle
actionLine.narrative_collapse: Watching for narrative shift or institutional re-engagement
actionLine.silent_compounder: Patient thesis · no trigger required · re-evaluate at next earnings
actionLine.temporary_damage: Next signal: management acknowledgement of cyclical cause
actionLine.consensus_fear: Wait for visible deterioration to slow before acting
actionLine.forgotten_quality: Watching for institutional re-engagement or narrative shift toward quality
actionLine.anti_hype_value: Watch for capital rotation back into quality compounders
actionLine.expectation_mismatch: Watch consensus EPS revisions for next two quarters
actionLine.overpriced_perfection: Watch margin trajectory and any growth deceleration
actionLine.unclassified_buy: Re-evaluate the caveats at next earnings
actionLine.unclassified_wait: Watch for the next data point before acting
actionLine.unclassified_avoid: Wait for tangible improvement before re-engaging

conviction.underPressureReassess: Under pressure · reassess before next data point
conviction.cyclicalPatience: Cyclical patience · wait for trough confirmation
conviction.narrativeRisk: Narrative risk · reassess on momentum shift
